memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  from http://www.thepeerage.com/p265.htm#i2647

Sir John de Sutton was born circa 1380.1 He married Constance Blount, daughter of Sir Walter Blount and Sancha de Ayala, before 10 December 1401.2 …

zh.Saffron Walden, Essex, England: 英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Sutton V於1380年2月出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親John Sutton IV18歲，母親Alice le Despencer18歲。他於1401年12月16日之前與Constance Blount結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1406年9月3日在他的家鄉享年26歲，埋葬在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Sutton V于1380年2月出生在英国斯塔福爾时，他的父亲John Sutton IV18岁，母亲Alice le Despencer18岁。他于1401年12月16日之前与Constance Blount结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1406年9月3日在他的家乡享年26岁，埋葬在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Sutton V was born in February 1380, in Staffordshire, England, his father, John Sutton IV, was 18 and his mother, Alice le Despencer, was 18. He married Constance Blount before 16 December 1401. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 3 September 1406, in his hometown, at the age of 26, and was buried in Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

fr.Dudley Castle, Dudley, West Midlands, En: Dudley Castle, Dudley, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Sutton V est né en février 1380, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Sutton IV, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Alice le Despencer, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Constance Blount avant 16 décembre 1401. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1406, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterré à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Sutton V im Februar 1380 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Sutton IV 18 und seine Mutter Alice le Despencer 18. Er hat vor 16. Dezember 1401 Constance Blount geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. September 1406 im Alter von 26 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Saffron Walden, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sutton V è nato il nel febbraio 1380 nel Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, John Sutton IV, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Alice le Despencer, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Constance Blount prima del 16 dicembre 1401. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 settembre 1406, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolto a Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Sutton Vが1380年2月にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Sutton IVは18歳，母Alice le Despencerは18歳であった。1401年12月16日以前にConstance Blountと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1406年9月3日に故郷で26歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Sutton V(이)가 1380년 2월 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Sutton IV(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice le Despencer(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1401년 12월 16일 이전 Constance Blount(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1406년 9월 3일 그의 고향에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sutton V nasceu em fevereiro de 1380, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Sutton IV, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Alice le Despencer, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Constance Blount antes 16 de dezembro de 1401. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1406, em sua cidade natal, com 26 anos, e foi sepultado em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Sutton V родился февраль 1380 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Sutton IV было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice le Despencer, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance Blount перед 16 декабрь 1401 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 сентября 1406 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 26 лет и был похоронен в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия.
